notes: 1w metrics. First-ever post. Solid discovery for a brand new account (169 imp, 82 reached). Contradiction hook on unanswered calls.
6d metrics. Schedule holes reframe. Gained 1 follower. Steady mid-tier performer.

5d metrics. BEST POST BY FAR — 374 impressions, 205 reached (2.5x next best). Follow-up problem framing resonated massively. Provocative statement hook + $250k unscheduled treatment stat likely drove shares/saves.
First 22h metrics. Framework post on 72-hour recall protocol.
2d metrics. Myth-busting post on recall lists. Best raw impressions of all posts so far (145). Direct contradiction hook performing well for discovery.
1d metrics (updated from 22h). Framework post grew from 76→115 impressions (+51%), 49→64 reached (+31%). Reactions held at 2.
22h metrics. Full recall playbook giveaway post. Higher reach than post_002 at same mark (+34% impressions, +20% reach). Lower reactions so far but gained a follower.

20h metrics. Speed-to-lead 60-second scripts post. First post to get a comment! 120 imp / 82 reached is solid for 20h — tracking slightly above post_003 at same mark. Surprising number hook on 391% stat drove good discovery. Comment = real engagement signal.

1d metrics. HIGHEST ENGAGEMENT POST — 4 reactions, 3 comments, 2 DMs (first DMs ever). Review velocity contrarian hook crushed. Reviews/referrals pillar outperforming recall content. DMs from AI biz owners interested in DentiFlow — not dental buyers yet but signals authority building. Engagement rate 0.084 = 5x previous best.

23h metrics. WORST PERFORMER — 39 impressions, 0 engagement across the board. Generic analogy hook ('bucket with no bottom') didn't stop scroll. Posted on Sunday = low activity. Tried to cover 6 problems (missed calls, slow callbacks, no-shows, unscheduled tx, recall, marketing spend) instead of one sharp argument. Cliche metaphor + wrong day + scope creep = flatline. Lesson: contrarian/specific hooks outperform analogy hooks. Keep single-argument focus. Avoid Sunday posts.

~19h metrics. Mid-tier performer. 78 imp / 46 reached. 4 total engagements (2 reactions + 2 comments) = 5.1% engagement rate — 3rd best behind post_005 (8.4%) and post_002a (2.6%). Framework post on doctor voice in recall. Recall pillar continues to generate comment engagement. Hook 'Not every overdue patient should get the same text' performed — specific and contrarian enough to stop scroll.

~1d metrics. 93 imp / 65 reached. 1 reaction, 0 comments. Mid-low performer. Myth-busting hook (no-show system problem) generated decent discovery but no comment engagement. Speed-to-lead pillar continuing to underperform vs reviews/referrals (post_005 at 8.4%). Direct contradiction hook style landed lower than expected — may need stronger specificity in hook rather than just contradiction.
